content.thinking: Let me start by fetching the list of tickets in "Development Ready" status for the KAN project.

content.text: I'll fetch the Development Ready queue and then look up story points for each ticket.

input.command: jira issue list -q "project = KAN AND status = \"Development Ready\" AND resolution = Unresolved" --raw 2>&1
input.description: Fetch Development Ready tickets from KAN project

content.thinking: I have one ticket in the Development Ready queue: KAN-2. Now I need to fetch the full ticket details including customfield_10016 (story points).

content.text: One ticket found: KAN-2. Now fetching its full details for the story point field.

input.description: Fetch full KAN-2 ticket details including story points
